The '''infernal harpoon''' is a special non-tradeable [[harpoon]] created by using a [[smouldering stone]] on a [[dragon harpoon]], requiring 75 [[Fishing]] and 85 [[Cooking]] to craft. This cannot be boosted. It is non-reversible and grants 350 [[Cooking]] and 200 [[Fishing]] experience. It can be stored in a [[tackle box]].

[[Fish]] caught with a charged harpoon have a 1/3 ''(33%)'' chance to be cooked and destroyed instantly, granting half of the [[Cooking]] experience that would normally be gained from cooking the fish otherwise. [[Harpoonfish]] caught within the [[Tempoross]] minigame are '''not''' destroyed when cooked, making it a popular upgrade that saves 3 ticks (1.8 seconds) per fish. The harpoon will '''not''' consume big fish, such as the [[big shark]].{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/824552549650927616|date=26 January 2017|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/100483|archivedate=29 May 2020|quote=Incidentally, if you do get a big fish, the infernal harpoon will NOT incinerate it.}} Fishing training methods using [[tick manipulation]] also can use the infernal harpoon to avoid dropping 1/3rd of the fish caught.

Since it cannot revert to its components and cannot be traded, if lost on death in level 20 or higher [[Wilderness]] it is converted to {{coins|11000}}.

If all 5,000 charges are used on [[raw shark]]s, 525,000 Cooking experience will be gained which would save about 2 hours of cooking and destroy {{Coins|({{GEP|Raw shark}} * 5000)}} in fish.

When using the infernal harpoon at leaping harpoonfish spots at [[Tempoross]], or when using it with [[Rada's blessing]] and/or [[spirit flakes]], the extra fish has a separate independent chance to be cooked.

==Special Attack==
The infernal harpoon has the same special attack as the [[dragon harpoon]], ''Fishstabber'', that provides a visible +3 [[boost]] to [[Fishing]], consuming 100% [[special attack]] energy. 

Note that any levels boosted above 99 with the special attack will be treated as 99. Therefore, you will start to receive diminishing returns with the special attack at level 97 and 98, with there being no value in activating the special attack at level 99.

==Charging and Degradation==
The harpoon is initially created with 5,000 charges at the cost of {{Coins|{{GEP|Smouldering_stone}}+{{GEP|Dragon harpoon}}}}. One charge is depleted each time a fish is automatically cooked. After all charges are consumed the harpoon will still work like a basic dragon harpoon. 

In its uncharged state the harpoon can be recharged with either another [[smouldering stone]] or another [[dragon harpoon]]. This means recharging can be cheaper than the initial 5000 charges when crafted.
